headings.styles: font-black tracking-tight to tracking-tighter. Use fluid scales max text-6xl. No standard bold, use black or light.

mono.styles: uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs for labels and overlines.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Tasteful mesh gradients using Primary (Blue/Purple/Cyan). Avoid full-screen gradients. Use as glowing orbs behind glass panels or text clip backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-2xl, saturated background (bg-black/60 dark, bg-white/70 light), 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10 dark, border-black/5 light).
visual_enhancers.borders: Gradient borders on featured cards using mask-image or p-[1px] gradient background wrappers.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient + Direct layered shadows. Colored glowing shadows for active elements (e.g., shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)]).
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay fixed to viewport with mix-blend-overlay and opacity-20.

grids_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 inside sections. py-24 or py-32 for section wrappers.
grids_layouts.bento_grid: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Projects and About sections. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create asymmetry.
grids_layouts.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align text content. Avoid generic center-everything.

motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom framer-motion cursor with a subtle glow blending with the background (mix-blend-difference).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons, cursor glow hover effects on cards, ripple effects on click, slight tilt (framer-motion 3D) on project cards.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Staggered scroll reveals for lists and grid items. Elements slide up slightly with opacity fade.
motion_and_interactions.particles: TSParticles or lightweight custom floating dust in the hero background.

components.navigation: Floating glass navbar. Sticky top, z-50. Includes scroll progress indicator (thin gradient line at bottom edge of nav). Active section highlights.
components.hero: Animated typing effect for title, floating geometric shapes, glowing mesh gradient orbs, prominent CTA buttons with magnetic effect.
components.timeline: Vertical line with neon glowing dot for current role. Hovering over roles highlights the path.
components.skills: Floating logo cards. Animated progress bars that fill on scroll.
components.charts: Recharts radar chart or circular progress for technical expertise matrix.
components.cards: Glass cards with gradient borders. Aceternity-style tracing beam on the premium featured projects.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast standards. High contrast for text over gradients. Use text-shadow if needed.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add aria-hidden to purely decorative elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

images.description: Formal man in beige blazer for the About/Hero section
Abstract futuristic dark spiral texture for hero/footer dark mode
White and black digital lines texture for light mode backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use Framer Motion for all complex animations (stagger, layout, magnetic, 3D tilt).
DO NOT use generic centered text for hero sections. Use a stark left-aligned heavy typographic layout (Tetris bento) for a tech/SaaS premium look.
Implement theme toggling (Dark, Light, System) seamlessly. Avoid flashing. Store preference in local storage or use next-themes equivalent for React.
Use Lucide React or Phosphor Icons for sharp, tech-style icons.
Use standard React (CRA/Vite layout) as requested. Do not set up Next.js.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for the floating nav. Use backdrop-blur-xl with a tinted background (bg-black/60 or bg-white/70).
For gradient borders, wrap the element in a div with a linear-gradient background and p-[1px], inner div should have the surface color.
Avoid `transition: all`. Specify exact transitions like `transition: transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease`.
Add a custom cursor using framer-motion if possible, blending with the background (mix-blend-difference).
Build the tech expertise chart using Recharts (RadarChart).
Ensure 'data-testid' is on all actionable elements.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Focus on high-end execution. No AI slop. Create depth with z-index, glassmorphism, and subtle ambient shadows. Never center-align the whole app container. Use generous spacing (p-12 to py-32). Micro-animations are mandatory on all interactives.
